TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit RunData extends Azure.ResourceManager.Models.ResourceData implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.RunData>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.RunData>

type RunData = class inherit ResourceData interface IJsonModel<RunData> interface IPersistableModel<RunData>

Docs.summary: Run resource properties.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property AgentCpu As Nullable(Of Integer)

Docs.summary: The CPU configuration in terms of number of cores required for the run.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property AgentPoolName As String

Docs.summary: The dedicated agent pool for the run.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property CreatedOn As Nullable(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: The time the run was scheduled.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property CustomRegistries As IList(Of String)

Docs.summary: The list of custom registries that were logged in during this run.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property FinishOn As Nullable(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: The time the run finished.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ImageUpdateTrigger As ContainerRegistryTaskImageUpdateTrigger

Docs.summary: The image update trigger that caused the run. This is applicable if the task has base image trigger configured.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property IsArchiveEnabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)

Docs.summary: The value that indicates whether archiving is enabled or not.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property LastUpdatedOn As Nullable(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: The last updated time for the run.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property LogArtifact As ContainerRegistryTaskImageDescriptor

Docs.summary: The image description for the log artifact.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property OutputImages As IList(Of ContainerRegistryTaskImageDescriptor)

Docs.summary: The list of all images that were generated from the run. This is applicable if the run generates base image dependencies.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Platform As ContainerRegistryTaskPlatformProperties

Docs.summary: The platform properties against which the run will happen.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ProvisioningState As Nullable(Of ContainerRegistryTaskProvisioningState)

Docs.summary: The provisioning state of a run.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property RunErrorMessage As String

Docs.summary: The error message received from backend systems after the run is scheduled.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property RunId As String

Docs.summary: The unique identifier for the run.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property RunType As Nullable(Of ContainerRegistryTaskRunType)

Docs.summary: The type of run.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property SourceRegistryAuth As String

Docs.summary: The scope of the credentials that were used to login to the source registry during this run.
The source trigger that caused the run.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property StartOn As Nullable(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: The time the run started.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Status As Nullable(Of ContainerRegistryTaskRunStatus)

Docs.summary: The current status of the run.
